document.name: Broadway YMCA — Youth Swim Lessons (Staten Island)
document.shortDescription: Staten Island North Shore Y: YMCA swim lesson pathway from parent-and-child water discovery through teen stages, plus instructional sports and early-child programs at the Broadway branch.
document.longDescription:
The YMCA of Greater New York’s Broadway branch on Staten Island publishes youth aquatics and instructional programming on its Programs & Classes page, including swim lessons for parent-and-child (Water Discovery ages 6–36 months with required adult in-water participation; Water Exploration ages 18–36 months), preschool stages 1–4 (ages 3–5), school-age stages 1–6 (ages 5–12), and teen stages 1–2 and 3–4 (ages 12–17) with detailed skill progressions listed for each stage.

The same page also highlights instructional sports such as Basketball Clinic and Quickstart Tennis (ages 5–12) and an early-childhood “Let’s Get Ready for 3K” series for two- and three-year-olds. Seasonal registration windows are published in a session table (for example Spring II programming starting April 27 with member and community registration dates).

Branch address and main telephone appear in structured data on the branch landing page: 651 Broadway, Staten Island, NY 10310; 718-981-4933. Public branch hours on that page: Monday–Friday 6:00 a.m.–8:30 p.m.; Saturday–Sunday 8:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m.

The listing image is an official YMCA swim-program photograph from YMCA-hosted media used in the Broadway branch gallery, re-uploaded to ImgBB for ClassScout storage policy compliance.

Sources: https://ymcanyc.org/locations/broadway-ymca/programs-classes/ https://ymcanyc.org/locations/broadway-ymca
document.announcementDescription: Official page lists Winter/Spring/Summer/Fall windows and member vs community registration dates — check ymcanyc.org for the current session.
